title: Port ev package: domain enums, factory types, and StringEncodedValue
summary: Ported 38 new source files and 3 test files from GraphHopper routing/ev: StringEncodedValue (8 tests), 15 domain enums (RoadAccess, RoadEnvironment, Surface, Smoothness, Toll, TrackType, Hazmat, HazmatTunnel, HazmatWater, Hgv, UrbanDensity, RouteNetwork, Crossing, Footway, MaxWeightExcept), 22 factory types (Lanes, MaxWeight, MaxWidth, MaxHeight, MaxLength, MaxAxleLoad, MaxSpeed, MaxSpeedEstimated, MaxSlope, AverageSlope, GetOffBike, Roundabout, RoadClassLink, FerrySpeed, OSMWayID, Orientation, Curvature, Lit, HikeRating, HorseRating, MtbRating, Subnetwork), plus MaxWeightTest and RoadAccessTest.
